name: negative_wrong_control_id_format
description: Negative case: body text uses lowercase 'ac-2' and stray non-control formats ('AC2', 'AC_2', '2-AC'). _CONTROL_ID_RE is uppercase-only and requires the canonical hyphen form '[A-Z]{2}-\d{1,2}'; none of these match. Tier 3 should produce zero hits. Pins the regex's strictness — a regression that adds re.IGNORECASE would tag this case.

evidence.text: References ac-2 lowercase, AC2 without hyphen, AC_2 with underscore, and 2-AC reversed. None of these match the canonical form.
